revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ref expand}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = {{{name|Ref expand}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | type = content | class = ambox-Refimprove | image = [[File:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|link=|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''needs more complete [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] for [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|verification]]'''. | fix = Please help [[Help:Footnotes|add missing citation information]] so that sources are clearly identifiable. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles with incomplete citations | all = All articles with incomplete citations | all2 = All pages needing cleanup }}<!--{{Ref expand}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage, thanks --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ref expand}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = {{{name|Ref expand}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | type = content | class = ambox-Refimprove | image = [[File:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|link=|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''needs more complete [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] for [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|verification]]'''. | fix = Please help [[Help:Footnotes|add missing citation information]] so that sources are clearly identifiable. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles with incomplete citations | all = All articles with incomplete citations | all2 = All pages needing cleanup }}<!--{{Ref expand}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage, thanks --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ref expand}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = {{{name|Ref expand}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | type = content | class = ambox-Refimprove | image = [[File:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|link=|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''needs more complete [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] for [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|verification]]'''. | fix = Please help [[Help:Footnotes|add missing citation information]] so that sources are clearly identifiable. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles with incomplete citations | all = All articles with incomplete citations | all2 = All pages needing cleanup }}<!--{{Ref expand}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage, thanks --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Full_citations_needed here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Full_citations_needed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ref expand}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = {{{name|Ref expand}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | type = content | class = ambox-Refimprove | image = [[File:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|link=|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''needs more complete [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] for [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|verification]]'''. | fix = Please help [[Help:Footnotes|add missing citation information]] so that sources are clearly identifiable. | removalnotice = yes | talk = {{{talk|}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles with incomplete citations | all = All articles with incomplete citations | all2 = All pages needing cleanup }}<!--{{Ref expand}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage, thanks --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Full_citations_needed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = {{{name|Ref expand}}}
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}}
| type  = content
| class = ambox-Refimprove
| image = [[File:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|link=|alt=]]
| issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''needs more complete [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] for [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|verification]]'''.
| fix   = Please help [[Help:Footnotes|add missing citation information]] so that sources are clearly identifiable.
| removalnotice = yes
| talk  = {{{talk|}}}
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| cat        = Articles with incomplete citations
| all        = All articles with incomplete citations
| all2       = All pages needing cleanup
}}
}}<noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
